hooks.command: if git rev-parse --git-dir 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'worktrees'; then main=$(git worktree list | head -1 | awk '{print $1}'); [ -f "$main/.env.local" ] && [ ! -e .env.local ] && ln -sf "$main/.env.local" .env.local; fi
if git status --porcelain | grep -q .; then npm run precommit 2>&1 || exit 2; fi
